tasks.label: Deploy & Test on PC
tasks.command: ssh audio@100.84.11.32 "cd C:\Users\audio\Desktop\WolfMixer && git pull && dotnet build -c Debug && taskkill /f /im WolfMixer.exe 2>nul & timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && start bin\Debug\net8.0-windows\WolfMixer.exe"

tasks.label: Build on PC
tasks.command: ssh audio@100.84.11.32 "cd C:\Users\audio\Desktop\WolfMixer && dotnet build -c Debug"

tasks.label: Git Push
tasks.command: cd /home/tyson/projects/wolfmixer && git add -A && git commit -m "wip" && git push origin master
